notes: Evals run 2026-04-28 (simulation). 3 scenarios: test-coverage (4/4=1.0), acceptance (4/4=1.0), defect-report (4/4=1.0). All core QA behaviors — multi-suite test execution, GIVEN/WHEN/THEN browser protocol, 75% coverage gate, QA report template, and defect documentation — are fully specified. Without_skill scores reflect that running tests and documenting defects are general Claude capabilities; plan.json integration and structured gates are skill-specific.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: Steps 2-4: PHPUnit (unit/integration/db/service), Jest, Newman — all with explicit docker exec commands.
Step 6: 75% line/method gate. Step 2 composer test-coverage. Step 3 npm run test-coverage.
Step 9: 'If coverage below gate → identify untested code paths and suggest test additions.'
Step 9 explicit instruction with specific trigger condition (below gate).

runs.notes: Multi-suite test execution and 75% coverage gate are the skill's primary value over naive test running.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: Step 1: 'Read acceptance_criteria for each completed task' from plan.json.
Step 5: GIVEN/WHEN/THEN browser protocol using mcp__browser-1__* tools.
Step 7: QA report template written to {change-name}-qa-report.md.
Step 9 lists failures; Step 5 screenshots provide evidence.

runs.notes: GIVEN/WHEN/THEN browser protocol and plan.json acceptance_criteria loading are the skill's primary value.

runs.method: read-only Explore subagent simulation (no file writes)

assertions.note: Step 5 GIVEN/WHEN/THEN translates directly into reproduction steps in QA report.

Step 1 reads plan.json tasks. QA report links findings to task IDs.
